catalog.name: Epistola Demo Catalog
catalog.description: Sample templates, themes, stencils, and attributes for getting started with Epistola.

resources.name: Epistola Logo
resources.description: Small brand logo for use in templates.

resources.name: Language
resources.description: Document language for multi-language template variants.

resources.name: Corporate Theme
resources.description: A clean corporate theme with professional styling.

resources.name: Company Header
resources.description: Reusable company header block with logo placeholder and company name.

resources.name: Letter Shell
resources.description: A simple letter shell with a body placeholder that templates fill. Demonstrates the placeholder default/fill pattern.

resources.name: Hello World
resources.description: A minimal template to get started. Contains a heading and a paragraph with data binding.

resources.name: Quality Showcase
resources.description: Deliberately flawed: an empty block and an overlong one, so the quality report and editor panel have real findings to show. Enable the alpha 'quality' feature to see them.

resources.name: Simple Letter
resources.description: A basic letter template with sender, recipient, subject, and body.

resources.name: Invoice Template
resources.description: Professional invoice with line items, tax calculation, QR payment code, and conditional notes. Demonstrates datatables, columns, tables, conditionals, expressions, and the cover-page + running pageheader pattern.

resources.name: Verkeersboete
resources.description: Dutch traffic-fine notice (CJIB-style). Showcases locale-aware date and number formatting via $formatDate (four distinct patterns — long-form, short, date+time, no-leading-zero) and $formatLocaleNumber (integer speeds and currency amounts). Three variants exercise the locale chain: default (inherits from tenant/app), nl-NL (Dutch month names, '1.234,56' grouping), en-US (English month names, '1,234.56' grouping).
